text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Powerhouse Umamusume gather on the day of
the Hanshin J.F. Surrounded by opponents who
are clearly more skilled than her, Vodka starts to
feel the pressure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I advise her that it's cooler to lose with style than
give up without trying.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Those words ease some of her stress, and Vodka
bravely takes on the race.
